description: User = manually created via form. System = auto-created by Sales Projection Automation at 02:00 AM or via the Run button. Set automatically — do not edit.
label: Created By
name: Production Plan-custom_created_by

description: Auto-populated by the system when custom_created_by = System. Explains the scenario (forecast shortage or 0-forecast SO demand) and shows the full formula breakdown.
label: Creation Reason
name: Production Plan-custom_creation_reason

description: Production qty in a chosen UOM (e.g. Carton). System auto-computes Planned Qty (in stock UOM).
label: Planned Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Item-custom_qty_in_uom

description: Sales Projection that triggered this Production Plan. Used by the automation to prevent duplicate PPs for the same item+projection. Blank for manually created plans or buffer-triggered plans.
label: Source Projection
name: Production Plan-custom_projection_reference

description: Filtered to the UOMs defined on this row's item.
label: UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Item-custom_uom

description: Auto = pulls Item.custom_mrp on save. Manual = freeform edit.
label: MRP Source
name: Production Plan Item-custom_mrp_source

description: Production qty in a chosen UOM (e.g. Carton). System auto-computes the standard Quantity (in stock UOM) = this × Conversion Factor. Standard `quantity` stays in stock UOM.
label: Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: BOM-custom_qty_in_uom

description: Filtered to the UOMs defined on the BOM's item. Leave blank to disable UOM-conversion auto-compute.
label: Pick UOM [TOC]
name: BOM-custom_uom

description: Sub-assembly required qty in chosen UOM. System auto-computes the standard Required Qty (in stock UOM).
label: Required Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Sub Assembly Item-custom_required_qty_in_uom

description: Auto-fetched from Item's UOM Conversion Detail when a UOM is picked.
label: Conversion Factor [TOC]
name: BOM-custom_uom_conversion_factor

description: Filtered to the UOMs defined on this sub-assembly's item.
label: UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Sub Assembly Item-custom_uom

description: Auto = pulls Item.custom_mrp on save. Manual = freeform edit.
label: MRP Source
name: Work Order-custom_mrp_source

description: Read-only: projected_qty ÷ CF. Recomputed when UOM changes.
label: Projected Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Sub Assembly Item-custom_projected_qty_in_uom

description: Mirror of system `creation`. Read-only; kept in sync by the BOM validate hook.
label: Created Time
name: BOM-custom_created_time

description: Maximum Retail Price. Auto-fetched from Item unless source is Manual.
label: MRP
name: Work Order-custom_mrp

description: Sub-assembly qty to order in chosen UOM. System auto-computes the standard Qty to Order (in stock UOM).
label: Qty to Order in UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Sub Assembly Item-custom_qty_to_order_in_uom

description: Mirror of system `owner`. Read-only; kept in sync by the BOM validate hook.
label: Created By
name: BOM-custom_created_by

description: Production qty in a chosen UOM (e.g. Carton). System auto-computes the standard Qty (in stock UOM) = this × Conversion Factor.
label: Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Work Order-custom_qty_in_uom

description: Pick any UOM defined on the produced item. Leave blank to disable UOM-conversion auto-compute (entry in Qty stays authoritative).
label: UOM [TOC]
name: Work Order-custom_uom

description: Auto-fetched from Item's UOM Conversion Detail when a UOM is picked.
label: Conversion Factor [TOC]
name: Work Order-custom_uom_conversion_factor

description: Mirror of the standard Produced Qty in the TOC UOM.
label: Produced Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Production Plan Item-custom_produced_qty_in_uom

description: Mirror of the standard Manufactured Qty in the TOC UOM = produced_qty ÷ custom_uom_conversion_factor. Bidirectional sync — updated on every save + when a Manufacture-purpose Stock Entry posts against this WO.
label: Manufactured Qty in UOM [TOC]
name: Work Order-custom_produced_qty_in_uom

description: v0.0.15 — Item group fetched from production_item.item_group. Adds an in_standard_filter chip on the Work Order list so operators can filter by item group without typing the link query.
label: Item Group
name: Work Order-custom_item_group

description: v0.0.15 — Batch number produced by this Work Order's Manufacture Stock Entry. Auto-populated by on_stock_entry_submit_refresh_produced hook (single batch per WO assumption). Backfill via patches/v1_0/backfill_wo_batch_fields.py reads tabBatch.reference_name = wo.name.
label: Batch No
name: Work Order-custom_batch_no

description: v0.0.15 — Manufacturing date of the produced batch. Mirrors tabBatch.manufacturing_date.
label: Manufacture Date
name: Work Order-custom_manufacturing_date

description: v0.0.15 — Date the Batch row was created in the system (Batch.creation). Useful for audit when manufacturing_date is backdated.
label: Batch Date
name: Work Order-custom_batch_date

description: v0.0.15 — Best-before (expiry) date of the produced batch. Mirrors tabBatch.expiry_date.
label: Best Before Date
name: Work Order-custom_best_before_date

description: v0.0.16 — Item.shelf_life_in_days mirrored onto the WO. Auto-fetched via fetch_from on save; backfilled by patches/v1_0/wo_product_life_and_filter_scope.py for historical rows.
label: Product Life [Days]
name: Work Order-custom_product_life_days

description: v0.0.17 — Count of non-cancelled Work Orders that reference this BOM (tabWork Order.bom_no = this.name). Auto-updated on WO insert/cancel via doc_events; backfilled by patches/v1_0/bom_list_polish.py.
label: Work Orders
name: BOM-custom_wo_count

description: Mirror of system `creation` timestamp. Read-only; kept in sync by the Work Order validate hook.
label: Created Time
name: Work Order-custom_created_time

description: Mirror of system `owner` field. Read-only; kept in sync by the Work Order validate hook.
label: Created By
name: Work Order-custom_created_by

description: 'By System' = auto-created by TOC at 7:00 AM. 'By User' = manually created. System MRs are sorted by BP% priority.
label: Recorded By [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_recorded_by

description: F3: Zone at MR creation. Green=safe | Yellow=plan | Red=URGENT | Black=STOCKOUT.
label: Buffer Zone [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_zone

description: F3: BP% = (Target − IP) ÷ Target × 100. Higher = more urgent.
label: Buffer Penetration % [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_bp_pct

description: F1: Target = ADU × RLT × VF at time of MR creation.
label: Target Buffer [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_target_buffer

description: F2: True available stock at time of MR creation.
label: Inventory Position [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_inventory_position

description: F3 alt: SR% = IP ÷ Target × 100. SR% + BP% = 100%.
label: Stock Remaining % [TOC App]
name: Material Request-custom_toc_sr_pct

description: Step 1: Enable TOC for this item. This REPLACES the default ERPNext reorder levels. The standard Auto Material Request scheduler is disabled when TOC App is installed.
label: 1. Enable TOC Buffer Management
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_enable

description: CHECK this to activate TOC for this item. When ON: item appears on Production Priority Board, MRs are auto-created at 7:00 AM based on Buffer Penetration %. The default ERPNext reorder level is IGNORED.
label: Enable TOC [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_enabled

description: CHECK if this item is PURCHASED from suppliers. System creates Purchase-type Material Request → becomes Purchase Order. Use for RM and PM items.
label: Auto Purchase TOC [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_auto_purchase

description: CHECK if this item is MANUFACTURED in-house. System creates Manufacture-type Material Request → becomes Work Order. Use for FG and SFG items. You can only choose ONE: Purchase OR Manufacturing.
label: Auto Manufacturing TOC [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_auto_manufacture

description: 'By System' = created from TOC Material Request. 'By User' = manually created.
label: Recorded By [TOC App]
name: Work Order-custom_toc_recorded_by

description:
ADU = Average Daily Usage. It is the FIRST input to Formula F1: Target Buffer = ADU × RLT × VF.

HOW IT WORKS: Every day at 6:30 AM, the TOC scheduler automatically calculates ADU by:
• For FG items: counting total qty shipped in Delivery Notes over the selected period, then dividing by number of days.
• For RM/PM items: counting total qty consumed in Stock Entries (Material Issue / Manufacture) over the selected period.
• For SFG items: counting total qty consumed from Stock Entries where this SFG was used.

OR: Check 'Custom ADU' below to enter your own value manually — the scheduler will SKIP this item.
label: 2. Average Daily Usage (ADU) — Formula F1 Component
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_adu

description: Buffer zone when WO was created. Red/Black WOs have ABSOLUTE priority on constraint machine.
label: Buffer Zone [TOC App]
name: Work Order-custom_toc_zone

description: CHECK this if you want to enter ADU MANUALLY instead of using the auto-calculated value. When checked, the daily 6:30 AM scheduler will SKIP this item and will NOT overwrite your manual ADU value. Useful when you know the correct demand but there's no history in the system yet.
label: Custom ADU (Manual Entry) [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_custom_adu

description: F3: BP% at WO creation. Higher BP% = higher priority on VFFS.
label: Buffer Penetration % [TOC App]
name: Work Order-custom_toc_bp_pct

description: How far back should the scheduler look when auto-calculating ADU? Last 30 Days = responsive to recent trends. Last 90 Days = recommended default. Last 180/365 Days = for stable/seasonal items.
label: ADU Calculation Period [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_adu_period
options:
Last 30 Days
Last 90 Days
Last 180 Days
Last 365 Days

description: Average Daily Usage in units per day. If 'Custom ADU' is checked, enter your value here manually. Otherwise, this is auto-calculated daily at 6:30 AM from actual shipment/consumption data. This feeds into F1: Target = ADU × RLT × VF.
label: ADU Value (units/day) [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_adu_value

description: When was ADU last auto-calculated by the scheduler? If this timestamp is old, check Scheduled Job Log for errors. Shows 'Manual' if Custom ADU is checked.
label: ADU Last Calculated [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_adu_last_updated

description: F5 tie-breaker: When two FG items have EQUAL Buffer Penetration %, which should the VFFS run first? The one with higher T/CU (more ₹ earned per minute of bottleneck time). T = Price − (RM+PM cost). T/CU = T × Speed.
label: 3. Throughput per Constraint Unit — T/CU (Formula F5, FG only)
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_tcu

description: Selling price per unit. Used in F5: T = Price − TVC.
label: Selling Price [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_selling_price

description: ONLY raw material + packaging cost per unit. Do NOT include labour, electricity, rent — those are fixed costs that don't change per SKU.
label: Truly Variable Cost (RM+PM) [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_tvc

description: Bottleneck machine speed for this SKU (e.g. VFFS pouches/min).
label: Constraint Speed (units/min) [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_constraint_speed

description: Auto-calculated: F5 = (Price − TVC) × Speed. Higher = earns more per constraint minute.
label: T/CU (₹/min) [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_tcu

description:
For FG/SFG items: The system reads the ERPNext BOM (Bill of Materials) to check SFG and material availability BEFORE recommending production.

Multi-level: One FG BOM can have multiple SFGs + raw materials. One SFG BOM can also have sub-SFGs + materials. The system walks the full BOM tree.

If you link a BOM here, the Production Priority Board will show SFG availability status and flag shortfalls.
label: 4. BOM & SFG Dependency (R3)
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_bom

description: Link the active BOM for this item. TOC uses this to check if all SFGs and raw materials are available before scheduling production. Leave blank to skip BOM checking.
label: Default BOM for TOC [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_default_bom

description: When checked, the system reads the BOM and checks each component's buffer status. If any SFG or RM component is in Red/Black zone, a warning appears on the Production Priority Board.
label: Check BOM Availability [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_check_bom_availability

description: Add one row per warehouse. Enter RLT (lead time days) and VF (variability factor). ADU comes from Section 2 above. The system auto-calculates Target Buffer = ADU × RLT × VF.
label: 5. Buffer Rules per Warehouse (Formula F1: Target = ADU × RLT × VF)
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_rules

description: Each row = one warehouse buffer. The scheduler checks BP% daily at 7:00 AM and creates Material Requests for Yellow/Red zone items.
label: TOC Buffer Rules [TOC App]
name: Item-custom_toc_buffer_rules

description: Add one row per warehouse: the minimum batch the line is willing to produce / the minimum lot the supplier is willing to ship. Auto Production Plan automation raises shortage qty up to this floor before creating the PP. Auto-seeded from Work Order history at 00:00 daily for items without rows.
label: 6. Minimum Purchase / Production Qty per Warehouse
name: Item-custom_toc_sec_minmfg

description: Per-warehouse minimum batch size. Columns: Warehouse · Min Purchase / Production Qty · UOM. Used by Production Plan automation (Calc A + Calc B) to raise shortage qty when below this floor.
label: Minimum Manufacture / Purchase Qty per Warehouse
name: Item-custom_minimum_manufacture
